notes: NEW: Macro Knobs — assign knobs as modulation sources controlling multiple parameters
NEW: Studder — stutter / glitch / beat-repeat effect
Clock: PPQN now selectable (1, 4, 8, 12, 24, 48) on global settings screen
Modulation: added Offset and Scaling to all modulation destinations
Modulation: new destination modulation meter on Quick Mod Config screen
Modulation: 'Clear Mod Routings' added to Quick Settings screen
UI: 'Saving' indicator added to all screens where Quick Save is available
UI: new Sticky Knobs feature — tap Shift to disable single-knob view timeout
Fix: Master Gain default corrected to unity (was set to max gain)
Fix: Esu's Shimmer damping display corrected (now shows 200-18000 Hz)
Reverse Delay: now clock-syncable, fixed scratchiness on time adjust, eliminated hard clicks
